description: You are a bioinformatics scientist analyzing the human hemoglobin beta (HBB) protein. Extract the human sequence (sp|P68871|HBB_HUMAN) from ~/UGENE_Data/hemoglobin_beta_multispecies.fasta and save it to ~/UGENE_Data/results/wt_hbb.fasta. Create a Sickle Cell variant at ~/UGENE_Data/results/sickle_hbb.fasta by mutating the Glutamate (E) at position 7 to Valine (V) (changing the sequence prefix MVHLTPEEKS... to MVHLTPVEKS...). Determine the Molecular Weight (MW) and Isoelectric Point (pI) for both the wild-type and mutated sequences. Document these properties in a report at ~/UGENE_Data/results/charge_analysis_report.txt, specifying which variant has a higher pI and which would migrate faster toward the anode during gel electrophoresis at pH 8.6.
